owner_operator_stated: Site describes the practice as "Locally Owned" without naming individual owners; the legal entity on record, Glenview Dental Associates, Ltd, is not named anywhere on the site.
notes: Address (1637 Waukegan Rd, Glenview, IL 60025) and phone ((847) 657-0750) match the record exactly, but the corroborated site is branded "Refine Dental," not "Glenview Dental Associates, Ltd" (the record entity) -- indicates a rebrand/possible ownership transition at the same address/phone. Stale third-party directories (CareCredit, BBB, Facebook) still list the old "Glenview Dental Associates" name at this location. 3 named dentists found on the live site; no careers/hiring page found.

Vendor-hinted site dymedental.com could not be loaded (SSL certificate error on both https and http attempts), so no first-party corroboration by address or phone was possible. A third-party directory (Healthgrades) lists "Dyme Dental" at 1500 Waukegan Rd Ste 225, Glenview, IL 60025 (address matches record) but with phone (847) 657-0535, which differs from the record's phone (847) 724-2444. Other directories (Yelp, Vitals, WebMD, BBB) list the same address under "Jeanette Jensen, DDS"/"Jeanette Toft Jensen, DDS," consistent with the record name, and state she opened her own practice in 1993, but none of this is first-party site evidence.

owner_operator_stated: Site identifies Dr. Eunhee Choi, DDS ("UIC dental school graduate ... over 20 years of experience") as the practice owner; no mention of Badegian or Badegian Dental Group, P.C. anywhere on the site.
notes: Record entity is "Badegian Dental Group, P.C." (Dr. Jane Badegian) but the live, corroborated site at the same address/phone (1304 Waukegan Rd, (847) 486-8888) is "Smiles of Glenview," owned by Dr. Eunhee Choi -- apparent practice sale/succession. Stale directories (Yelp, Sharecare, WebMD, Doctors Network) still list "Badegian Jane E DDS" at this address/phone. Attempted /about page for a fuller roster returned 404; no careers page found.

Vendor hint (glenviewsmiles.com) resolves to "The Center for Dental Healing" at 2400 Ravine Way #400, Glenview, IL 60025, phone 847.998.5100 -- a different suite and phone number than this record (Ste 500, (847) 509-1990) in the same office building, so it was rejected as belonging to a different practice. Directory listings (Yelp, WebMD, DentalInsider) consistently show "Gregory S. Jacob, DDS"/"Glengrove Dental Associates" at 2400 Ravine Way Ste 500, phone (847) 509-1990, but no first-party practice website could be located; DentalInsider and Vitals pages for Dr. Jacob returned errors (404/403).

owner_operator_stated: Site states Dr. Ali Nematollahi and Dr. Katayoun Attari are married co-founding owners of the practice, consistent with the record entity "Ali Nematollahi D.D.S., P.C."
notes: Address (2634 Patriot Blvd Suite A, Glenview, IL 60026) and phone ((847) 998-0255) match the record exactly; owner names match the record entity. No careers/hiring page found (attempted /careers/, returned 404).

owner_operator_stated: Site identifies Dr. Ralph Shepstone as owner/practice principal, matching the record entity name exactly.
notes: Vendor hint (glenlakedentalcare.com) is WRONG for this record -- that site is Glenlake Dental Care at a completely different address (946 Harlem Ave, Glenview, IL 60025) and phone ((847) 724-3969); rejected. The record's own name, "Ralph Shepstone, D.D.S.," matches the practice at 3633 West Lake Ave, Ste 304, Glenview, IL 60026 (glenviewfamilydentist.com) exactly, though that site lists phone (847) 998-8989, not the record's (847) 729-6300 -- likely a different/older line at the same solo practice, not a different owner. 3633 W Lake Ave is a multi-suite medical building shared with other unrelated dental practices (Nolan & Freund Ste 414, CareOne Dental Associates, and a now-closed Lakeshore Dental Associates); the record's provider_count of 9 could not be corroborated on-site -- only 1 dentist (Shepstone) found. No careers page found.
